description: Free weather forecast API — no API key required. Often more accurate than commercial alternatives because it blends national weather services (DWD, NOAA, MeteoFrance, etc.). Includes forecast, historical, marine, air quality, geocoding.

forecast.notes: Hourly/daily forecast up to 16 days. Required: latitude, longitude. Optional: hourly, daily, current, timezone, past_days, forecast_days. Example: ?latitude=52.52&longitude=13.41&hourly=temperature_2m,precipitation

air-quality.notes: Air-quality index, PM2.5, PM10, NO2, O3, SO2, CO. Same lat/lon params.

marine.notes: Wave height, direction, period — surf/sailing forecast.

elevation.notes: Terrain elevation in meters for lat/lon (or batch lat=...&lat=...&lon=...&lon=...).

geocoding.notes: City/place name → coordinates + admin/country. Param: name=. NOTE: this endpoint is hosted at geocoding-api.open-meteo.com — pass full upstream override if engine routes it elsewhere.
